title: Informix Connector Options
text: Informix Connector Options To set connector options, use the USYS$INF_PARAMS assignment setting in the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file. USYS$INF_PARAMS Option { , Option n Options checking connection dbms ri delimident Engine Type field name size fixed point hold cursors IsolationLevel lock lockmode multi byte nls procs read rebuildcursor serial insert table name size trim wildcard literals Description Most connector options enable or disable features. Some options have a numeric parameter (a non-negative decimal integer). Every numeric option has a default value, although the range of valid values is option-specific. Syntax Rules The syntax rules for USYS$INF_PARAMS are as follows: The assignment can be no longer than one line in the assignment file. Each option may be specified once. The order in which the options are specified is not significant. Multiple options must be separated by a comma. Words and numbers within each option are separated by one or more spaces or tabs. Options are not case-dependent. For example: USYS$INF_PARAMS dbms ri, nls, procs, lockmode wait Copy Related Links [DRIVER_SETTINGS] Use the [DRIVER_SETTINGS] section of the assignment file to specify the database and component engine connectors used, and their parameter options. The options available depend on the connector in use. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
